message:
feat(fsqlite-types): expand core type system with encoding, flags, ECS, and glossary

Major expansion of the foundational types crate:

- ecs.rs: extend entity-component-store types with additional component
  kinds and query helpers for the page/btree layer
- flags.rs: add comprehensive SQLite-compatible flag definitions for
  database open modes, journal modes, sync flags, and lock states
- glossary.rs: expand the inline glossary with detailed documentation
  of SQLite internal terminology (WAL, SHM, checkpointing, overflow
  chains, etc.) to serve as a reference for contributors
- lib.rs: wire up new modules and re-export key types
- value.rs: minor fix to value type handling
- encoding.rs (new): add text encoding types and conversion utilities
  for SQLite's UTF-8/UTF-16 text handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
